_comment: [IF] E2E readiness thresholds — tune via ops, never hardcode in code

phase1_static_knowledge._description: Verify static + real-time knowledge layers work correctly before E2E
checks: source_docs contains NAS file paths (not empty)

layer4_health._description: [IF] Layer 4 real-time sources — tune thresholds via ops

law_go_kr.check: www.law.go.kr/DRF/lawSearch.do returns HTTP 200 for ra_kr profile
law_go_kr._note: Optional: ra_kr only, graceful degradation if unavailable

phase2_dynamic_learning._description: Verify Honcho warmstart and growth metrics show measurable signal

escalation_precision._note: > 80% of escalations actually needed human intervention

e2e_test_readiness._description: Minimum bar for running full E2E real-mail test
additional_checks: all 3 profiles (ra_us, ra_eu, ra_kr) respond without error
